problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: Combining BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
